channel.title: Technical on AB Improvement Proposals (AIPs)
channel.description: Recent content in Technical on AB Improvement Proposals (AIPs)

item.title: Basic Token Standard (ARC-20)
item.description: Simple Summary # A standard interface for tokens. Abstract # The following standard allows for the implementation of a standard API for tokens within smart contracts. This standard provides basic functionality to transfer tokens, as well as allow tokens to be approved so they can be spent by another on-chain third party. Motivation # A standard interface allows any tokens on AB to be re-used by other applications: from wallets to decentralized exchanges.

item.title: Non-Fungible Token Standard (NFT, ARC-721)
item.description: Simple Summary # A standard interface for non-fungible tokens, also known as deeds. Abstract # The following standard allows for the implementation of a standard API for NFTs within smart contracts. This standard provides basic functionality to track and transfer NFTs. We considered use cases of NFTs being owned and transacted by individuals as well as consignment to third party brokers/wallets/auctioneers (“operators”). NFTs can represent ownership over digital or physical assets.
